Here Sie können change names for Kurs Standorte that come from Kursagenten. Wenn Sie change the name of a Standort, the slugs (URLs) of Kurse at that Standort are also updated.

1. The new Standort is speichernd wenn Sie klicken Sie "Speichern".
2. The Standort is "translated" to the new name when Kurse are fetched from Kursagenten.
3. Slugs/URLs for Kurse at this Standort are updated immediately.
4. The old Standort is not deleted, but is no longer visible on the website.
